changes.summary: Drawer links for Trade Builder, Import Rankings, League Calendar, and League Summary now open reliably on theleague.us again.
Category badges on What's New cards with thumbnails are now vertically centered on the border at all screen sizes
Opponent average and rank columns in the player modal weekly stats now show real data from MFL instead of placeholder values
Draft pick numbers on the League Planner now show the correct positions from MFL instead of approximations from standings
Extension candidates and franchise tag options on the League Planner now show only your team's players instead of candidates from every team in the league
